arts.ttl: we earn our money ourselves, says Borussia Dortmund legend
arts.sum: But don’t forget: thanks to our recent Champions League record, we’re one of only two German teams going to the new Club World Cup. Despite falling short this season, Borussia Dortmund still stands for long-term success.. Ricken spoke to AS ahead of Dortmund’s first leg Champions League clash with Barça, making it clear: this season’s final game for the club should once again be in the Bavarian capital.
